final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing infographic showing a step-by-step tutorial for deploying Hermes in a Docker container and integrating with GLMCodingPlan.

Style/medium: infographic, step-by-step tutorial diagram
Composition: numbered 1-2-3-4 steps layout, clear visual flow
Subject: Docker container deployment of Hermes, GLMCodingPlan integration
Scene/backdrop: technical documentation layout with command blocks and diagrams
Lighting/mood: clean, instructional, professional
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): "1", "2", "3", "4", "Hermes", "GLMCodingPlan", "Docker"
Constraints: must show 4 distinct steps clearly numbered
Avoid:
